bird.name: 鸵鸟
bird.summary: 非洲鸵鸟（学名：Struthio camelus）属鸵形目鸵鸟科，是世界上最大的一种鸟类，生活于非洲的沙漠草地和稀树草原地带，因其羽、皮及肉等都有很高的经济价值，有生长快、繁殖力强、易饲养和抗病力强等优点，在许多国家被广泛驯养。相較於其他鳥類，鴕鳥的習性其實與草食哺乳類較為相近…

locations.name: 撒哈拉沙漠
locations.summary: 撒哈拉沙漠（阿拉伯語：الصحراء الكبرى，aṣ-Ṣaḥrāʾ al-Kubrā ， 清朝直譯大沙漠）位於非洲大陸北部，是世界最热的荒漠，亦是世界第三大荒漠，仅次于南极和北极，同时也是世界上最大的沙漠，其总面积超过9,400,00…

locations.name: 安納托利亞
locations.summary: 安纳托利亚（英語：Anatolia；希臘語：ανατολή；土耳其語：Anadolu；亞拉姆語：ܐܢܛܘܠܝܐ；亞美尼亞語：Անատոլիա），亦作安纳托力亚、安那托利亞、阿纳多卢，又名小亞細亞（土耳其語：Küçük Asya；英語：As…

locations.name: 達赫拉克群島
locations.summary: 達赫拉克群島（提格利尼亞語：ዳህላክ，英語：Dahlac Archipelago）是非洲東北部國家厄立特里亞的群島，位於馬薩瓦附近的紅海，由兩個大島和124個小島組成，總面積估計約1,165平方公里，該群島盛產珍珠。群岛中最大的岛屿为大达…

locations.name: 红海
locations.summary: 红海（阿拉伯語：البحر الأحمر；希伯來語：יַם סוּף；英語：Red Sea）位于非洲东北部与阿拉伯半岛之间，呈狭长型，长约2250公里，最宽355公里，均深490米，最深3040米，面积438,000平方公里。其西北面通过…

locations.name: 厄立特里亚
locations.summary: 厄立特里亚国（英語：State of Eritrea，提格利尼亞語：ሃገረ ኤርትራ，阿拉伯語：دولة إرتريا）， 通稱厄利垂亞，是位於非洲東北部的国家，濒临红海，面积11.7万平方公里，人口約368萬人（2024年），首都为阿斯…

relations.subject: 鸵鸟
relations.evidence: Common ostriches formerly occupied Africa north and south of the Sahara, East Africa, Africa south of the rainforest belt, and much of Asia Minor. Today common ostriches prefer open land and are native to the savannas and Sahel of Africa, both north and south of the equatorial forest zone. In southwest Africa they inhabit the semi-desert or true desert

relations.subject: 鸵鸟
relations.evidence: Attempts to reintroduce the common ostrich into Israel have failed. Common ostriches have occasionally been seen inhabiting islands on the Dahlak Archipelago, in the Red Sea near Eritrea

relations.subject: 鸵鸟
relations.evidence: | title = A Bird Like No Other | work = National Wildlife | publisher = National Wildlife Federation | date = 1 August 2006 | access-date = 25 April 2020 | url = https://www.nwf.org/Magazines/National-Wildlife/2006/A-Bird-Like-No-Other }} When lying down and hiding from predators, the birds lay their heads and necks flat on the ground, making them appear like a mound of earth from a distance, aided by the heat haze in their hot, dry habitat. When threatened, common ostriches run away, but they can cause serious injury and death with kicks from their powerful legs. Their legs can only kick forward. The kick from an ostrich can yield
relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。
